academic_requirements.summary: Applicants need a secondary-school qualification valid for university entry. International applicants must complete a preliminary evaluation on apply.unive.it. Admission to the first year is limited and based on an entry-test ranking.
academic_requirements.prior_degree_or_diploma: Secondary school leaving qualification eligible for university admission; for international qualifications, at least 12 years of schooling are required.
academic_requirements.subject_requirements: The programme requires adequate knowledge of mathematics, logic, and reading comprehension, plus English at B2 level. First-year admission requires participation in the ranking procedure based on the TOLC-E test; Ca' Foscari also accepts CEnT-S for 2026/2027.
academic_requirements.gpa_or_country_requirements: Country-specific validity rules apply under Ca' Foscari's 'Entry requirements for applicants with an international qualification'; applicants with less than 12 years of schooling must document how the gap is covered.
academic_requirements.committee_or_pre_evaluation: The Welcome Unit carries out the preliminary evaluation for international qualifications on apply.unive.it. The public first-year admission pages focus on the test-and-ranking procedure; Teaching Committee evaluation is explicitly mentioned for later credit-recognition cases.

accepted_proofs: A recognised B2-or-higher English certification from Ca' Foscari's official list, such as Cambridge FCE, IELTS 5.5-6.5, TOEFL iBT 72-94, or PTE Academic 59-75.
A certificate from Ca' Foscari CLA or from a university language school included in Ca' Foscari's recognised-certifications list.
Proof that the applicant falls within an official exemption category.
exemption_rules: Completed higher-education studies or at least one year of college in a country where English is the medium of instruction.
Obtained a high-school or university qualification from a course taught entirely in English.
Completed at least one full year of high-school exchange in English.
Holds one of the listed degree exemptions in languages or linguistic mediation that includes a three-year English course.
language_requirements.assessment_or_upload_stage: Proof is uploaded at enrolment. If the requirement is missing at enrolment, the programme assigns an English B2 OFA.
language_requirements.deadline: By enrolment; otherwise the English B2 OFA must be fulfilled by the end of the first year of study.

rounds: Spring selection: the current public page confirms the round and states that admitted candidates must accept their place by 14 May 2026 and enrol from 1 July 2026 to 31 July 2026; the exact public registration window for this round is not clearly stated on the current page [uncertain].
Summer selection: register for the Ca' Foscari selection from 1 July 2026 to 28 August 2026; take the TOLC-E by midnight on 28 August 2026; admitted candidates must enrol by 10 September 2026.
application_deadline_eu.enrolment_deadline: 31 July 2026 for admitted spring-round candidates; 10 September 2026 for admitted summer-round candidates.
application_deadline_eu.notes: The public page confirms two 2026/2027 selection rounds, spring and summer. English TOLC-E tests are not considered, and the best valid TOLC-E result is used.

rounds: The exact application rounds for non-EU applicants requiring a study visa are shown on apply.unive.it only after selecting the correct applicant category [uncertain].
application_deadline_non_eu.visa_or_pre_enrolment_deadline: Check the non-EU study-visa category deadline shown on apply.unive.it; the public Hospitality page does not state a single programme-specific visa deadline [uncertain].
application_deadline_non_eu.current_status: The 2026/2027 admission-rounds article is published, but the exact Hospitality deadline for non-EU visa applicants is category-based on apply.unive.it [uncertain].
application_deadline_non_eu.notes: Ca' Foscari accepts CEnT-S for Hospitality Innovation and e-Tourism in 2026/2027. The CEnT-S third-period results deadline of 30 June 2026 is too late for non-European applicants to submit an application, and the fourth-period results deadline is too late for any applicant with an international qualification.

required_documents.document_name: Valid passport or ID card, or receipt of renewal/first request
required_documents.notes: European applicants may use an ID card; international applications without the mandatory identification document are rejected.

required_documents.document_name: Valid residence permit or receipt of renewal/first request
required_documents.notes: Required for non-European applicants already residing in Italy or in the Schengen Area.

required_documents.document_name: Secondary-school mark sheet or transcript of records for at least the last year of study
required_documents.notes: If the applicant is still attending the last year of secondary school, a provisional mark sheet/transcript is mandatory; official English or Italian translations are required when needed.

Optional at application stage if not yet available, but the final document must be uploaded before the end of the enrolment period if a provisional document was used; translations are required when needed.

required_documents.document_name: Professional English or Italian translations of diplomas/transcripts
required_documents.notes: Required when the original documents are not in English or Italian; translations may be issued by professional translators, courts, or court interpreters.

required_documents.document_name: Statement of Comparability, Declaration of Value, ARDI Statement of Correspondence plus CIMEA Statement of Verification, or Diploma Supplement
required_documents.notes: These are not mandatory during the application procedure but are highly recommended because they support the evaluation of the qualification.

required_documents.document_name: Recognised English B2 certificate or proof of exemption
required_documents.notes: Mandatory for enrolment in this English-taught programme.
Required for first-year ranking-based admission; English TOLC-E tests are not considered.

entry_exam_or_test.test_name: TOLC-E; Ca' Foscari also accepts CEnT-S for 2026/2027
entry_exam_or_test.applies_to: All first-year applicants to this limited-admission programme; international applicants are also subject to preliminary evaluation for their qualification.
entry_exam_or_test.dates: Summer selection: register from 1 July 2026 to 28 August 2026 and take the TOLC-E by midnight on 28 August 2026. Ca' Foscari-hosted TOLC@UNI dates for the summer selection are 28-30 July 2026, 4-7 August 2026, and 25-28 August 2026. The public page also confirms a spring selection round.
entry_exam_or_test.scoring_or_threshold: Applicants are ranked on their TOLC-E result. A score below 9/36 (English section excluded) leads to a logic-mathematics OFA. English TOLC-E tests are not considered.

source_quotes.quote: This is a limited-admission programme taught in English
must have completed at least 12 years of schooling
A minimum B2-level knowledge of English is mandatory
two selection rounds: spring and summer

uncertainty_notes: The current public page clearly states the spring-round acceptance and enrolment deadlines, but the spring registration window is not equally clear on the same public page.
For non-EU applicants requiring a study visa, Ca' Foscari routes applicants to citizenship-specific rounds on apply.unive.it rather than publishing a single Hospitality-specific public deadline.
